title: ADR-0194: Stale Run Sweep CLI
description: Add a stale-run sweep command to the joelclaw CLI that identifies and reports stale Inngest runs using kubectl + SQLite forensics.

stories.title: Add joelclaw runs stale command to detect stale runs
stories.description: Add a 'stale' subcommand to the existing 'runs' command in packages/cli/src/commands/runs.ts. It should: (1) Run `joelclaw runs --status RUNNING --hours 24` to get currently-running runs, (2) For each run, call `joelclaw run <run-id>` to get the trace, (3) If the trace shows a terminal state (completed/failed/cancelled) but the list still shows RUNNING, flag it as stale, (4) Output a HATEOAS JSON envelope with the stale runs list and next_actions suggesting backup + sweep. Use the existing run/runs command patterns in the file. Register the subcommand properly.
stories.acceptance: Command `joelclaw runs stale` returns JSON envelope with stale run IDs. Compiles clean: `bunx tsc --noEmit`. Follow existing command patterns.

stories.title: Add joelclaw runs backup command for pre-sweep safety
stories.description: Add a 'backup' subcommand to runs command that executes: kubectl -n joelclaw exec inngest-0 -- sqlite3 /data/main.db '.backup /data/main.db.pre-sweep-<timestamp>.sqlite'. Return the backup filename in a HATEOAS envelope. This is the mandatory pre-mutation step from ADR-0194.
stories.acceptance: Command `joelclaw runs backup` creates a timestamped SQLite backup inside the inngest-0 pod. Returns backup path in JSON envelope. Compiles clean.
